summary: Executed backend pytest regression (16 tests) and frontend Playwright checks for admin/student MVP flows, PWA assets, and mobile responsiveness via public URL.

ui_bugs.issue: No dedicated student email/password login form in UI; student auth is only via join-class form requiring class code + profile fields.

integration_issues.flow: Admin immediate logout right after login toast
integration_issues.issue: Logout click can be blocked/interfered when toast overlay is still visible at top-right; works after toast timeout.

action_items: Add explicit student email/password login UI path (without requiring join-class fields) to match requirement.
Prevent toast overlay from blocking topbar actions (especially logout) or relocate toast stack.
critical_code_review_comments: Hydration/DOM warning observed in browser console: invalid nested element inside <option> (span child).
test_credentials.md is effectively empty (no explicit credential listing), while credentials are seeded in code; keep this file updated for future testing agents.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test data via APIs: course/class/students/material/assignment/submission/reminder.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend flows pass on public URL including pending_drive_config submission behavior and XLSX export validity. Frontend core flows mostly pass; confirm student dedicated login UI and toast-overlay interaction before final signoff.
rca of the issue: Student UI auth mismatch RCA: App.js LoginScreen renders student mode as join-class form only; no separate email/password login component for existing students. Overlay RCA: top-right toast overlaps topbar region where logout button sits; immediate clicks may target overlay until toast auto-dismisses.
